node.title: Chances of Clearing the Uber OA?

article.title: Chances of Clearing the Uber OA?
article.content:
I recently completed the Uber Online Assessment, which included two problems on HackerRank (web proctored). I was able to fully solve the first problem. For the second problem, I passed 12 out of 15 test cases. I missed the memoization part due to limited time, which caused a TLE on the remaining test cases.

What are my chances of getting shortlisted for the phone screening round after this?

Similar question on leetcode for both the questions:
Question 1 (Solved completely): https://leetcode.com/problems/minimum-jumps-to-reach-end-via-prime-teleportation/description/
Question 2 (Passed 12/15 TC): https://leetcode.com/problems/furthest-building-you-can-reach/description/

Thanks in advance.

post.content: Can you indicate what questions were asked?
Uber has a 50% pass criteria, you\'ll go ahead to the next round as long as there is availability. \nPrepare grids and graphs - tricky algorithms for your next Phone Screen Round, good luck!
can you please confirm if these are the exact questions ?
Bro , I too got the OA link and attempted the 2 questions , still I didn\'t got any update  .
Is it an 1 hour test for both problems?
